itemListElement.reviewBody: The quality of education at Scottish High is exemplary. From curriculum to overall development of students speaks a great deal of its commitment. A broad curriculum system with both national and international curriculum, modern infrastructure and state-of-the-art facilities, well-equipped classrooms, sports facilities, team of experienced and dedicated teachers with a passion for teaching are some of the highlights that give the school the leading edge. Overall, a great place for students to grow multidimensional!

itemReviewed.name: Scottish High International School - Sushant Lok 2

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very bad experience with their process . They expect kid to miss their school and follow their registration process . I tried to convince them to consider post school hours or weekend like other school do , but they disagree and will follow the same rules . Also , I tried to consider it online, but school wants it face to face . I strongly disconnect with the stringent process and disagree on missing the school in order to attend the enrolment process . I hope , one day they will understand the importance of not missing school even for a day and try to be flexible in future.

itemReviewed.name: Scottish High International School - Sushant Lok 2

itemListElement.reviewBody:
The most suitable destination for well-rounded education. Teachers, staff, infrastructure, facilities, extra-curricular, sports, each aspect speaks of quality with commitment. I would certainly recommend Scottish High for parents looking for a wholesome package for their ward.

I always wanted my ward to excel not only in academics but also in sports, and Scottish High has successfully done it. The faculty and facilities combine so well to give the students ample exposure and opportunities!

Teachers are well-trained and very supportive. This is what makes all the difference at Scottish High!

The best thing about Scottish High is that every child is given individual attention. This makes even the average student to come forward and make progress.

itemReviewed.name: Scottish High International School - Sushant Lok 2

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Best IGCSE Schools in Gurgaon

Scottish High International School (SHIS) is a renowned educational institution located in Gurgaon, India. It is an English medium co-educational school affiliated to IB PYP, Cambridge IGCSE, ICSE, IB Diploma.

Established in 2004, The Scottish High International School aims at providing a holistic education that combines academic excellence with spiritual and ethical values.

The Scottish High International School provides education from Nursery to Senior Secondary level. The curriculum focuses on a balanced and comprehensive approach, which includes academic subjects, co-curricular activities, sports and arts. The school strives to promote the intellectual, emotional, physical and moral development of the students.

The school has well equipped classrooms, science and computer laboratories, library, sports facilities and other infrastructure to aid the learning and development of the students. It also emphasizes the importance of spiritual and moral values, encouraging students to develop a sense of social responsibility and ethical behaviour.

The school fosters a vibrant and inclusive learning environment. It offers various extra-curricular activities including sports, performing arts, visual arts, debates and cultural events. The school also encourages community service and social initiatives.

itemReviewed.name: Scottish High International School - Sushant Lok 2

itemListElement.reviewBody:
We are lucky to have a school like Scottish High in Gurgaon. We were looking for a good school to enroll our son in nursery school. We had already visited some of the top schools in Gurugram  - finally our search came to an end after visiting Scottish High.

At Scottish High, learning through play is one of the main ways in which children learn and develop. It is through fun and play that young learners acquire essential skills such as imagination, dexterity, creativity, physical, emotional and cognitive strength, working with others, sharing and collaborating and much
